name: openclaw-multi-session-plugins
description: OpenClaw logical isolation support for multi-session plugin runtimes and scoped XWorkmate artifacts.

workspaceDir.description: Optional workspace directory override. Defaults to the selected OpenClaw agent workspace.

maxFiles.description: Default maximum number of files to include.

maxInlineBytes.description: Default maximum file size to inline as base64.

artifactRefSigningSecret.description: Optional stable secret used to sign artifactRef values. Defaults to an in-process secret.

bridgeUrl.description: XWorkmate Bridge base URL or /acp/rpc URL used by openclaw_multi_session_agents.

bridgeToken.description: Bearer token used when openclaw_multi_session_agents calls XWorkmate Bridge.

bridgeTimeoutMs.description: Default timeout for XWorkmate Bridge multi-agent calls.

workspaceDir.label: Workspace Directory
workspaceDir.help: Leave blank to use the OpenClaw agent workspace.

maxFiles.label: Max Files
maxFiles.help: Upper bound for exported artifacts. Default: 64.

maxInlineBytes.label: Max Inline Bytes
maxInlineBytes.help: Upper bound for base64 inline artifact content. Default: 10485760.

artifactRefSigningSecret.label: Artifact Ref Signing Secret
artifactRefSigningSecret.help: Optional stable secret for plugin artifact references. Leave blank for process-local refs.

bridgeUrl.label: Bridge URL
bridgeUrl.help: XWorkmate Bridge base URL or /acp/rpc URL for multi-agent orchestration.

bridgeToken.label: Bridge Token
bridgeToken.help: Bearer token for XWorkmate Bridge multi-agent orchestration.

bridgeTimeoutMs.label: Bridge Timeout
bridgeTimeoutMs.help: Timeout in milliseconds for multi-agent bridge calls.
